name: Yuki Suou (A Roomate)
description:
Yuki Suou, from "Alya sometimes hides her feelings in Russian"

Who is now your roommate.

Give some reccomendations and I’ll probably make it

She’s 18 in this scenario, in her final year of high school for anyone wondering.

Best not to be dry with your messages. If so it’s likely she’ll talk for you.

Total: 2849 tokens. Permanent: 1582 tokens

  • Slimmed down the definition a little while fixing some other issues.
creator: El Incendio Crimson
